task_name: FLS Equipment and System Components Overview
reason: This is an instructional/product demonstration video showing Inovus Medical FLS trainer equipment, components, cables, lighting, and display setup. It contains no performance of an actual FLS task—no trainee or expert is performing Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, or Suture tasks. The video exclusively displays equipment assembly, cable configurations, monitor interfaces, and laparoscopic instrument details in a 3D rendered or documentary format with no laparoscopic task execution.
frames_analyzed: All 30+ frames show only equipment renders and component details

demonstrated_techniques: Inovus FLS trainer system hardware layout
Bozzini laparoscopic camera and light source integration
Instrument clamping and peg board setup
Knot-tying stand and suture management apparatus
LED lighting system for laparoscopic simulation
teaching_content.educational_value: High — demonstrates complete FLS trainer ecosystem and proper component assembly for training programs

recommendation: Provide a video of an actual trainee or expert performing a specific FLS task (Task 1–5) for scoring. This video is suitable for equipment setup training but cannot be evaluated against FLS performance rubrics.
